transactions.description: St. Paul Saints released RHP Matt Bowman.
Atlanta Braves optioned RHP JR Ritchie to Gwinnett Stripers.
RHP Ben Simon assigned to Syracuse Mets from Binghamton Rumble Ponies.
Kansas City Royals recalled RHP Eli Morgan from Omaha Storm Chasers.
New York Yankees placed LHP Max Fried on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 14, 2026. Left elbow bone bruise.
